    Description
    static WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder
    WebFluxSseClientTransport.builder(org.springframework.web.reactive.function.client.WebClient.Builder webClientBuilder)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Creates a new builder for WebFluxSseClientTransport.
    WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder

    Sets the JSON mapper for serialization/deserialization.
    WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder
    WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder.messageEndpointValidator(io.modelcontextprotocol.client.transport.SseMessageEndpointValidator messageEndpointValidator)
    Sets the validator that ensure the message endpoint returned over the SSE connection is valid.
    WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder
    WebFluxSseClientTransport.Builder.sseEndpoint(String sseEndpoint)
    Sets the SSE endpoint path.
